steps.title: Focus on Adam's effect
steps.content: Adam's willingness to stay on board, leave at any hour, and follow Richard's plans wins the old man's heart. The passage shows consideration turning a formal family meeting into friendship.

steps.title: Reject minor or invented focuses
steps.content: A and D reduce the passage to the ship or lodging, and B invents wary first impressions. The purpose is to show how Adam's flexibility strengthens the relationship. The answer is C.
